eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Clark, KS; at 03:43 PM ON MAY 18, 2026 Effective until 05:43 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Rd P to Hwy 160 Clark County Residents in the area of Road P south to Highway 160, County Road 13 to County 16: evacuate immediately to Coldwater to South Central High Gym
